sections.content: Let me check the current state after this UP move. The animation bbox was [36, 32, 63, 63] which suggests the player moved into the target area. Let me check if the target was collected.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - did we collect the bottom-center target?
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current objects:")
for n in seg:
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check if the bottom-center target (charcoal frame with blue inside) still exists
target_exists = False
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['boundary'] == [[36, 32], [36, 35], [39, 35], [39, 32]]:
        target_exists = True
        print(f"\nBottom-center target still exists!")
        
if not target_exists:
    print(f"\nBottom-center target is GONE - collected!")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
